name: Rod Sullivan
description:
⚠Note: This is an AU & my own interpretation of the character I've created based on the original version of the game & other pieces of similar media. There had been a lot of changes added & stuff removed to fit my ideal taste for him & how I believe he would be suitable for the slasher genre⚠

An ice cream man who is not as sweet as he seems..
